title: An Investigational Study to Evaluate Experimental Medication BMS-986165 Compared to Placebo in Participants With Plaque Psoriasis (POETYK-PSO-3) in Mainland China, Taiwan, and South Korea

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures a sufficient sample size and allows for comparison of treatment effects over time.
This criterion helps ensure the study population is representative of patients with moderate to severe psoriasis, maximizing the likelihood of detecting a treatment effect.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures that participants are eligible for treatment and allows for comparison of treatment effects in this population.
This criterion may be a feasibility factor, as it could limit the study's generalizability to other types of psoriasis.
This criterion protects patients from potential complications related to infections.
This criterion ensures that participants are not already receiving treatment with BMS-986165, potentially leading to adverse effects or interactions.
This criterion is a general safety measure and does not directly relate to the study's primary objectives. It could be a feasibility factor, as it allows for flexibility in participant selection.

endpoints.text: The Percentage of Participants With sPGA Response of 0 or 1
The Percentage of Participants With PASI 75 Response
The Percentage of Participants With PASI 90 Response
The Percentage of Participants With PASI 100 Response
The Percentage of Participants With sPGA 0 Response
Change From Baseline in PSSD Symptom Score
The Percentage of Participants With Ss-PGA Score of 0 or 1
The Percentage of Participants With DLQI Score of 0 or 1
The Percentage of Participants With PGA-F Score of 0 or 1
The Percentage of Participants With PSSD Symptom Score of 0
The Percentage of Participants With Pp-PGA Score of 0 or 1
The Percentage of Participants With PASI 75 Response at Week 52
The Percentage of Participants With sPGA Response of 0 or 1 at Week 52

adaptive_designs.description: Standard fixed-design trial. No adaptive features detected.

safety_adverse_events.ae_ascertainment: Not explicitly described (assumed standard investigator reporting)
safety_adverse_events.safety_monitoring: Investigator-reported with sponsor oversight (no DSMB mentioned)
